titulo: Payouts King ransomware uses QEMU VMs to bypass endpoint security

titulo: Hackers are abusing unpatched Windows security flaws to hack into organizations | TechCrunch
resumo: A security researcher published details of three security vulnerabilities in Windows Defender, and the code used to exploit them. Now, hackers are taking advantage of the vulnerabilities in real-life attacks, according to a cybersecurity firm.

titulo: New Mirai Variant Nexcorium Hijacks DVR Devices for DDoS Attacks
resumo: Cybersecurity researchers at Fortinet have discovered Nexcorium, a new Mirai-based malware targeting TBK DVR systems to turn them into a botnet for DDoS attacks.
